title: Dr. Kildare Goes Home
writer: Harry Ruskin, Willis Goldbeck, Max Brand
actors: Lew Ayres, Lionel Barrymore, Laraine Day
plot: Dr. James Kildare has just completed his internship at Blair General Hospital and is assigned to work with his mentor, Dr. Leonard Gillespie. But fearing for the health of his father, Dr. Stephen Kildare, he returns to his parents...
